name: openttt-pot
description: Prevents context amnesia in Claude Code Dynamic Workflows. External cryptographic timestamps survive context compression — agents call pot_query(eventId) for O(1) exact step recall (2⁻²⁵⁶ collision probability). Causal DAG via prevEventId. pot_graph traverses full workflow timeline. Also: MEV ordering proofs, MiFIR Art.22c audit-grade timestamps. IETF draft-helmprotocol-tttps-00.
